threats.title: Tropic Trooper Uses Trojanized SumatraPDF and GitHub to Deploy AdaptixC2
threats.summary: Chinese-speaking individuals are the target of a new campaign that uses a trojanized version of SumatraPDF reader to deploy the AdaptixC2 Beacon post-exploitation agent and ultimately facilitate the abuse of Microsoft Visual Studio Code (VS Code) tunnels for remote access. threats.title: LMDeploy CVE-2026-33626 Flaw Exploited Within 13 Hours of Disclosure
threats.summary: A high-severity security flaw in LMDeploy, an open-source toolkit for compressing, deploying, and serving LLMs, has come under active exploitation in the wild less than 13 hours after its public disclosure.
